description_long: This shotgun features a robust metal barrel and receiver, paired with a wooden stock and fore-end that display a natural wood grain pattern. The barrel is thick and cylindrical, with a slightly matte finish, and the fore-end is ribbed for improved grip. The stock is a full, traditional design, extending straight back from the receiver and ending in a flat buttplate. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, enclosing a single trigger. The pump-action mechanism is clearly visible beneath the barrel, with a wooden grip section. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for urban environments where reliability is essential.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a metal barrel and receiver, wooden stock and fore-end, and a ribbed pump grip. The design is sturdy and functional, with a classic full stock and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel opening, ribbed pump grip below, and the alignment of the stock and receiver.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full wooden stock, ribbed pump grip, and the overall length of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat buttplate of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the pump grip and trigger guard.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, thick cylindrical barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
